description: A helper module which selects a matrix out of a delimited text file.
author: David Eby, Broad Institute
plan:
## SelectFileMatrix GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
SelectFileMatrix is a GenePattern module that A helper module which selects a matrix out of a delimited text file.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 10 parameters:
- Required: input.file, output.file.base.name
- Optional: delimiter, start.row, end.row, start.column, end.column, row.select, column.select, output.rejects

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>SelectFileMatrix.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-annotations.jar<path.separator><libdir>jopt-simple-3.3.jar<path.separator><libdir>jakarta-oro-2.0.8.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-lang-2.5.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-io-2.3.jar org.broadinstitute.modules.selectfilematrix.SelectFileMatrix <input.file> <output.file.base.name> <delimiter> <start.row> <end.row> <start.column> <end.column> <row.select> <column.select> <output.rejects>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.file
parameters.description: Name of the input file from which to pull the matrix.  Must be a delimited text file.

parameters.name: output.file.base.name
parameters.description: Base name for the output file.  The module will add an appropriate extension, either .csv for a comma-delimted file or .txt for a space- or tab-delimited file).

parameters.name: delimiter
parameters.description: Token naming the character for the output column delimiter. Choices are TAB, COMMA, and SPACE. TAB is the default.

parameters.name: start.row
parameters.description: Starting row of the matrix (line number within the file).  Defaults to the first row.

parameters.name: end.row
parameters.description: Ending row of the matrix (line number within the file).  Defaults to the last row.

parameters.name: start.column
parameters.description: Starting column of the matrix.  Defaults to the first column.

parameters.name: end.column
parameters.description: Ending column of the matrix. Defaults to the last column.

parameters.name: row.select
parameters.description: Select specific rows to include in the matrix (e.g. "3,5,7-12").  Note that start/end row parameters may limit this selection.

parameters.name: column.select
parameters.description: Select specific columns to include in the matrix (e.g. "1,2,4-6").  Note that start/end column parameters may limit this selection

parameters.name: output.rejects
parameters.description: Produce an output file containing the items not meeting the selection criteria.  The file will be named <output.file.base.name>.REJECT.<ext>
